reasons: The selected loop-through candidate remains wp-agent-registry-follow-up and is now described by one stronger static/local source helper.
Selection reason, source seam, status, routing target, validation gate, human decision gate, and authority boundary are now available from the selected-candidate model itself.
Root overview, deterministic agenda, deliberation, and the copy-only passalong continue to represent the same candidate consistently without adding persistence or routing complexity.
